channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12467] Binaries for OFED 4.5 mixed with Lustre 2.12.2
item.description:
The patchless server for Lustre 2.12.2 with MOFED (as downloaded from Whamcloud) is found to be linking with MOFED 4.5 rather than MOFED 4.6.  MOFED 4.5 binaries are included in the repository.

yum install lustre lustre-osd-ldiskfs-mount
Loaded plugins: fastestmirror
Loading mirror speeds from cached hostfile
Resolving Dependencies
--> Running transaction check
---> Package lustre.x86_64 0:2.12.2-1.el7 will be installed
--> Processing Dependency: kmod-lustre = 2.12.2 for package: lustre-2.12.2-1.el7.x86_64
--> Processing Dependency: lustre-osd for package: lustre-2.12.2-1.el7.x86_64
--> Processing Dependency: libyaml for package: lustre-2.12.2-1.el7.x86_64
--> Processing Dependency: libyaml-0.so.2()(64bit) for package: lustre-2.12.2-1.el7.x86_64
---> Package lustre-osd-ldiskfs-mount.x86_64 0:2.12.2-1.el7 will be installed
--> Running transaction check
---> Package kmod-lustre.x86_64 0:2.12.2-1.el7 will be installed
--> Processing Dependency: ksym(rdma_set_reuseaddr) = 0xeb13467e for package: kmod-lustre-2.12.2-1.el7.x86_64

{{ You could try using --skip-broken to work around the problem}}
{{ You could try running: rpm -Va --nofiles --nodigest}}
item.summary: Binaries for OFED 4.5 mixed with Lustre 2.12.2

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: It looks like the contents of the link have been updated

Hi kchan,

The issue has been fixed. Thank you for letting us know.
